Data Update Panel

Only the admin can unlock file updates. Without the password, viewers can only open the dashboard.

The upload panel stays locked until the correct password is entered.

After you rebuild the dashboard, click Publish Live to save the latest snapshot to Supabase. Viewers opening the Vercel link will then see the same updated version.

MTD Actual by Category

Click any card to update the detailed KPI, trend, map, charts, and table below.

Performance Summary

Detailed KPI for the selected category.

Daily Trend

The X-axis always shows days 1–31. Current stops at the latest available date, while last month continues through the full month.

Current    Last Month

Store Map

The map follows the selected category and area/store filters. Bubbles are smaller, auto-zoom is enabled, and the store ranking appears beside the map.

Top Stores on Map
Actual ranking follows the selected category and active filters.
Store positions use the master address file and the normalized name Blimbing. Bubbles adjust to the active category, area, and store filters.

Top 10 stores by actual

Top 10 stores by target achievement

Sorted from highest to lowest

Sorted from highest to lowest

Area Manager Performance (CTGT only)

Comparison of Actual vs LY vs LM for each Area Manager using CTGT - SQM.

CT + GT by Product Size

Combined SQM sales volume for each size (CT + GT).

CT Only by Product Size

SQM sales volume for CT (Tiles FT + Tiles WT). R/T sizes are merged into their base size.
